Start

Product

One platform. Every workflow.

CSorro combines the tools most teams already use separately: projects, storage, clients, communication, reviews, reports, invoices and AI.

Modules for every kind of team.

Enable what your workspace needs. Hide what it does not. CSorro is designed to be a business operating system, not a one-purpose app.

▣

Dashboard

Your daily briefing for projects, clients, reviews, storage and finance.

Explore →
☑

Projects

Tasks, files, chat, whiteboards and approvals in one project home.

Explore →
▢

Studio Review

Upload clips, leave timestamp comments, manage versions and approve work.

Explore →
▥

Storage

Workspace-owned storage with libraries, permissions, comments and versions.

Explore →
◈

CRM + Clients

Keep clients, contacts, projects, files, messages and invoices together.

Explore →
▨

Reports + Finance

Track delivery, create reports, manage invoices and understand performance.

Explore →

Dashboard

One place to start the day.

See what needs attention before opening five apps. Projects, reviews, files, clients, invoices and team activity come together in one workspace view.

  • Workspace health and daily priorities
  • Recent activity across projects
  • Storage, reviews and client updates

Projects

Work, files and conversations stay connected.

Every project has its own tasks, chat, files, whiteboards, approvals, notes and activity timeline — without duplicating storage.

Studio Review

Review clips, images and creative work without leaving the OS.

Upload versions, add timestamped comments, request changes, approve final work and keep the whole review history attached to the project.

00:42 intro too long03:12 music change
Episode 42 Cut 2Changes
Thumbnail v4Approved
Final exportReady
Brand KitProjectsClientsArchive
Logo Packv6
Client BriefShared
Project FilesPrivate

Workspace Storage

Your company drive, built into the work.

Files belong to the workspace. Projects link to them. That means one source of truth, version control, comments, permissions and usage tracking.

CRM, Reports & Finance

Turn completed work into business records.

Track clients, meetings, files, invoices, reports and project delivery from the same place your team already works.

ClientInvoiceReport
Monthly reportReady
Invoice #204Paid
Client timelineUpdated

See the OS from the inside.

Create a workspace and enable the modules your team actually needs.

Get started free →
CSorro OS
Built in Hull, United Kingdom. The business operating system for modern teams.
